species.name: Krag
species.description: Stocky, belligerent humanoids known for their aggressive nature and tough constitution. Krag society values strength and direct action above all else.
traits: Belligerent: Prone to aggression and conflict

special_rules.name: Famous Belligerence
special_rules.description: Krag characters are prone to conflict
special_rules.mechanical_effect: When rolling for Rivals, may reroll a natural 1 once per character. However, if creation rolls generate a Krag with one or more Rivals, add an additional Rival.

special_rules.name: Combat Readiness
special_rules.mechanical_effect: If getting into a fight or argument, it will always be a Krag that gets involved (player choice if multiple Krag).

special_rules.name: Krag-Armor
special_rules.description: Specialized armor designed for Krag physiology
special_rules.mechanical_effect: When acquiring armor, may be selected to be Krag-armor or not. Krag-armor is designed to fit Krag bodies and cannot be worn by other species.

special_rules.name: Movement Limitation
special_rules.mechanical_effect: Movement is reduced by 1" (base 3" instead of standard 4").

species.name: Skulker
species.description: Agile, rodent-like humanoids with enhanced senses and natural stealth capabilities. Skulkers are known for their quick reflexes and survival instincts.
traits: Biological Resistance: Natural immunity to certain effects

special_rules.name: Enhanced Mobility
special_rules.mechanical_effect: Movement is increased by 1" (base 5" instead of standard 4").

special_rules.name: Biological Resistance
special_rules.description: Natural resistance to toxins and biological effects
special_rules.mechanical_effect: Ignore effects from biological weapons, toxins, and disease. Immune to certain consumable negative effects.

special_rules.name: Keen Senses
special_rules.mechanical_effect: +1 to detection rolls and awareness checks during Exploration and stealth missions.

special_rules.name: Skittish
special_rules.mechanical_effect: If forced to make a morale check, -1 to the roll. However, may re-roll failed initiative checks once per battle.
